description:
§16.6 — using `slot="name"` to fill a PARAMETRIC snippet prop (`snippet(param: Type)`) SHALL fire E-COMPONENT-034. `TabStrip` declares `row: snippet(item: string)`; the use site tries `
x
` instead of the required lambda form. Reject (pos) half of the E-COMPONENT-034 pin; clean neg is components/slot-on-parametric-snippet-clean.
rationale: §16.6: 'Using slot= on a parametric snippet is E-COMPONENT-024 [impl#1: E-COMPONENT-034 — see the sPA-ss68 escalation report for the §16.6-vs-impl code-number divergence]... When a snippet prop accepts a parameter, the caller MUST provide a lambda. slot= desugaring does not apply to parametric snippets.' `row` takes an `item: string` parameter, so `slot="row"` (the zero-parameter desugaring form) is illegal.
